items.briefing:
Australian organisations are increasingly using AI tools faster than proper rules and oversight are in place to govern them, raising real risks around data handling and accountability. Separately, a warning from the education sector highlights how third-party vendors can be a weak link — a breach affecting one supplier can expose student and staff data across multiple institutions, which is particularly relevant for registered training organisations relying on external platforms and systems.

**Practical tip:** Review which third-party vendors have access to your organisation's data, and confirm they meet your security and privacy requirements.

featured.title: AI use outpaces governance in Australia & New Zealand
featured.quote: Half of Australian organisations lack AI governance, creating significant security and compliance risks.
